title: Meme death sound
description: This mod adds different funny sounds to player death.
body:
Mod adds different funny sounds that will play on player death:

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

Geometry dash death sound

GTA V death sound

Super mario world 3d death sound

Bomberman death sound

Church bell meme

Metal gear solid Snake death

Dry bones sound

Among us kill sound

Mario bros death

TF2 spy death

Fortnite death sound

Pacman death sound

Gmod death

Roblox death sound

</details>
